qa_pairs.question: What is the main purpose of the resources provided in this document?
qa_pairs.answer: The resources are considered potentially useful for building Research Platforms and Portals.

qa_pairs.question: Under what main categories are the resources in this document organized?
qa_pairs.answer: The resources are organized under 'General' and 'Meta-Scheduling' categories.

qa_pairs.question: Can you provide a general resource link for someone looking to build a gateway?
qa_pairs.answer: A general resource for building a gateway is available at https://sciencegateways.org/building-a-gateway.

qa_pairs.question: Where can one find an archive of webinars related to science gateways, according to this document?
qa_pairs.answer: An archive of webinars related to science gateways can be found at https://sciencegateways.org/engage/webinar-archive.

qa_pairs.question: What specific resource is listed under the 'Meta-Scheduling' category in this document?
What particular topic does the GitHub resource under 'Meta-Scheduling' address?
qa_pairs.answer: The GitHub resource addresses CbrainTask Recovery and Restart.

qa_pairs.question: Name one of the 'General' resources provided in this document that supports building Research Platforms and Portals.
What kind of information can be found at `https://github.com/aces/cbrain/wiki/CbrainTask-Recovery-and-Restart`?
qa_pairs.answer: It provides information related to CbrainTask Recovery and Restart as a meta-scheduling resource.

qa_pairs.question: What broad area of development do the listed URLs primarily support?
qa_pairs.answer: The listed URLs primarily support the development of Research Platforms and Portals.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any resources in this document focused on webinar archives for science gateways?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, webinar archives for science gateways are available at https://sciencegateways.org/engage/webinar-archive.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the resource detailing CbrainTask Recovery and Restart?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL for CbrainTask Recovery and Restart is https://github.com/aces/cbrain/wiki/CbrainTask-Recovery-and-Restart.

qa_pairs.question: Which domain is associated with the general resources for building gateways and accessing webinar archives?
qa_pairs.answer: The `sciencegateways.org` domain is associated with these general resources.
